page_content:
CHIN203 Intermediate Spoken Chinese II (3 Credits) Continuation of CHIN201. Prerequisite: CHIN201; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or must have attained appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score. Corequisite: CHIN204. Additional Information: Must be taken in conjunction with CHIN204.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

CHIN204 Intermediate Written Chinese II (3 Credits) Continuation of CHIN202. Prerequisite: CHIN202; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or must have attained appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score. Corequisite: CHIN203. Additional Information: Must be taken in conjunction with CHIN203.

CHIN205 Intermediate Chinese - Accelerated Track (3 Credits) Accelerated instruction in Mandarin Chinese at the intermediate level for students with prior Chinese language background, either through home use or formal instruction. Prerequisite: Must have attained appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score. Restriction: Must not have completed CHIN201, CHIN203, CHIN202, or CHIN204.

CHIN306 Life in China through TV Plays II (3 Credits) Continuation of CHIN305 using authentic Chinese language material in TV plays to learn about society and life in China. Prerequisite: CHIN305; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.
